---
title: "STAT 345 Final Project"
author: "Melia, Gracie, Kylee
output: word_document
date: "2026-04-15"
---

```{r}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(rvest)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)

rap_songs <- read.csv("rap_songs.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

clean_for_az <- function(x, type = c("artist", "title")) {
  type <- match.arg(type)
  x <- tolower(x)
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "&", " and ")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\(.*?\\)|\\[.*?\\]", " ")
  
  if (type == "title") {
    x <- str_replace(x, "\\s+(feat\\.?|ft\\.?|featuring|with)\\s+.*$", "")
  }
  
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "[^a-z0-9]+", "")
  x
}

build_az_url <- function(main_artist, title) {
  artist_part <- clean_for_az(main_artist, "artist")
  title_part <- clean_for_az(title, "title")
  
  paste0("https://www.azlyrics.com/lyrics/", artist_part, "/", title_part, ".html")
}

get_lyrics_az <- function(main_artist, title) {
  url <- build_az_url(main_artist, title)
  
  page <- tryCatch(
    read_html(url),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  
  if (is.null(page)) return(NA_character_)
  
  divs <- page %>% html_elements("div") %>% html_text()
  divs <- divs[!str_detect(divs, "Submit Corrections|Writer|AZLyrics|Thanks to")]
  divs <- divs[nchar(divs) > 100]
  
  if (length(divs) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  
  divs[which.max(nchar(divs))]
}
```

```{r}

```
